headline: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Edge Higher On Mixed Housing And Jobs Data
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Friday, Mar, 20 2026 US stock futures are slightly higher, with E-mini S&P 500 contracts up about 0.1%, as investors balance weak housing data against firmer signs of economic activity. New home sales dropped 17.6% in January to 587,000, while mortgage rates sit at 6.22%. This combination points to a tougher backdrop for homebuilders and housing linked plays. At the same time, the Philadelphia Fed manufacturing index climbed to 18.1 and jobless...
